introSection: Egypt Coaster is an indoor steel spinning kiddie roller coaster at Children's World in Ashgabat, Turkmenistan. this roller coaster opened with the opening of Children's World.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an figure-8 layout, It has green track and red supports. and the train has an Egyptian theme.

fullText:
Egypt Coaster is an indoor steel spinning kiddie roller coaster at Children's World in Ashgabat, Turkmenistan. this roller coaster opened with the opening of Children's World.

The ride has an figure-8 layout, It has green track and red supports. and the train has an Egyptian theme.
